
```{r}
Fq_Fm_data <- read.csv("Phenotype Analysis/3. Thermal Curves/outputs/FqFm_T3/ed50.csv")
# make Group a factor
Fq_Fm_data$Group <- as.factor(Fq_Fm_data$Group)
```

#Check normality of ED50 values and run test
```{r}
# load required libraries
library(stats)
library(FSA)

# Check assumptions for ANOVA
shapiro.test(Fq_Fm_data$ed50) # did not pass
bartlett.test(ed50 ~ Group, data = Fq_Fm_data) # did not pass

# Assumptions for ANOVA not met, using non-parametric alternative
# Kruskal-Wallis Rank Sum Test
kruskal.test(ed50 ~ Group, data = Fq_Fm_data)

# Post-hoc Dunn's test of multiple comparisons
# with Benjamini-Hochberg adjustment
dunn_result <- dunnTest(ed50 ~ Group, data = Fq_Fm_data, method = "bh")
View(dunn_result$res)
write.csv(dunn_result$res, "Phenotype Analysis/4. Statistical Analysis/ED50_posthoc_results.csv")
```
